text_block_list.name: Voice from the Screen
text_block_list.text:
And now, Lady Fine would like to share a few
words with us.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: ...Your Highness?

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: Your Highness, your statement.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Greetings, everyone. As per a prior agreement...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I, Fine Motion, will return to Ireland in one year.
In anticipation of that time, I wish to confirm
various...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The new year has only just begun, yet Fine
Motion is already swamped with official duties.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has a meeting with people from back home
today, so I'm waiting for her to finish.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Sorry for the wait, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Everyone back home is such a character. Before I
knew it, we were caught up talking about all sorts
of things.
choice_data_list: Well, shall we get started with training?
Well, shall we get started with training?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Um, can I take a little break first? I'd like to grab
a drink.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Normally, Fine Motion would be jumping at the
chance to go for a run, but recently she seems a
little apathetic.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: Trainer, may I ask you to go after Her Highness?

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
None of us possess the right to pry into Her
Highness's feelings. However... I'm sure she'd be
willing to reveal her feelings to you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...You haven't changed a bit since back then. The
way you run... even that stubborn face is the
same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I catch up with Fine Motion and find her speaking
with Air Shakur. Not wanting to interrupt, I'm
about to turn back, when...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you do that thing you always do?
Y'know, throw a big tantrum like the spoiled little
princess you are.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"But I wanna run more!" Say those magic words,
stomp your feet a little, and everything's solved,
right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...The thought has never crossed my mind. I'm
more than content with the amount I was able to
run.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Surely you can lie better than that.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you understand, Shakur. There's
something that I hold more dear than anything
else...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I truly wish to perform my duties from the bottom
of my heart. It's nothing so dramatic as
self-sacrifice.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Are all silver-spoon brats so altruistic, or is it just
you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Look, I don't care how you're justifying it. You're
not convincing anyone—including yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You realized just how enjoyable racing was at the
Queen Elizabeth II Cup, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
At the time, I'm sure the thought crossed your
mind—the desire to abandon your duties, stay
here and keep racing forever.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur, please... stop.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But you're trying to use reason to forcibly
suppress your instincts. That's why you don't feel
like running.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You can't focus, and your times haven't
improved... Even though you still have so much
more room to grow!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey, have you talked to your trainer about this? I
bet you haven't even mentioned it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ever since they talked me into that scrimmage
with you, your trainer's been by your side.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Even if you don't want to admit that you want to
keep racing, you're clearly not giving racing your
full attention either. Doesn't that make being
your trainer kinda pointless?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...I see. You may be right.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Perhaps I haven't fully placed my trust in Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Then, in that case—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: But it's because I can't ask for anything more.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Trainer is already shouldering such a large burden
for my sake.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to take advantage of that resolve.
Also...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I have to wrestle with these feelings on my own...
That's essential for my future.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch... You're so damn stubborn!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Wait, Shakur! Thank you for worrying about me!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...I'm not like you. I'm only doing this for my sake.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've just seen how you beat the odds. If you can
prove the data wrong, maybe that means things
can change...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's all I care about.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I don't know anything about data, but... I think
the two of us are more similar than you think.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've known it from the very first time we met—that
one day, you would definitely need me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Which is why I decided I need to stay by your
side.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What are you-—you are so full of yourself!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, perhaps so. I'm full of myself and I'm
stubborn, just like you say.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Let's say, hypothetically, if I asked you to keep
running... would you do it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If I said that I needed you to, would you become
my goddess—my guiding light?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh, forget I said anything!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Shakur. My duties—my destiny—are
very close to my heart.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...They need to be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Fine Motion wants to handle her
problems alone... but if she ever requires my help,
I will gladly fulfill the first vow we ever made.
